positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical graphic design featuring a stylized celestial mountain range, rendered in negative space silhouette against a vibrant, deep midnight blue background. The mountains should be adorned with minimalist glowing constellations and crescent moons, creating a feeling of wonder and cosmic grandeur. The style should be a harmonious blend of Art Deco elegance and clean modern geometry, utilizing crisp, high-contrast lines. Composition must be central and balanced, perfect for apparel printing. Focus on clean edges and solid color fields. Color palette suggestion: Deep royal blues, electric magenta accents, and stark white or gold for glowing elements. Studio lighting, vector art quality, print-ready.
negative: low detail, noisy, blurry, watermark, signature, text, logo, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, disfigured, grain, jpeg artifacts, muddy colors
